scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:core-crm && npm run sync:core-diffusion && npm run sync:core-mail && npm run sync:core-documents && npm run sync:core-market && npm run sync:core-telephony && npm run sync:core-ai && npm run sync:core-security
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && FUNCTIONS_DISCOVERY_TIMEOUT=60 firebase deploy --only functions
